description: Golden set used by RetrievalEvaluationService to compute Hit@K and MRR. A case may identify relevant results by document title, content phrase, domain metadata, or CVE ID. Cases mix English, Chinese, follow-up phrasing, and intent variation so that the metrics surface real retrieval weaknesses rather than rewarding only easy queries.

cases.question: Citrix NetScaler 有哪些已知遭利用的弱點
cases.notes: KEV-only query in Chinese; expects vector + sparse to surface high-profile Citrix CVEs.

cases.question: recent fortinet fortigate vulnerabilities
cases.notes: English vendor + product query; tests sparse vendor matching.

cases.question: Microsoft Defender denial of service
cases.notes: Specific product + vulnerability class; common-term query relies on BM25 IDF.

cases.question: What is CVE-2024-21762?
cases.notes: Direct CVE ID lookup; structural CVE bonus should make this trivial.

cases.question: 最近 Cisco 有哪些 critical 等級的弱點
cases.notes: Vendor + severity filter; depends on high-risk structural bonus.

cases.question: firewall policy guide
cases.notes: Pure knowledge-document query; should not be dominated by CVE results.

cases.question: ransomware exploited vulnerabilities
cases.notes: Tests ransomware tag handling and BM25 over multi-term query.

cases.question: netscaler 59.22 版本
cases.notes: Version-bearing query; planner must keep vendor + product even when version dominates the literal text.
